messages.content: You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I get my prescription refilled?
You can request a refill through three channels: the Acme Online portal, by calling the Acme Health Member Services phone line at 1-800-555-0100, or in person at any Acme pharmacy.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I get my maintenance medication through mail order?

Yes, you can get a 90-day supply of maintenance medications through mail order at the cost of a 60-day copay, but this option is not available for controlled substances, biologics, or refrigerated specialty medications.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I have a video visit with my regular provider?
You can have a video visit with your regular provider, but same-day video visits are typically with an Acme clinician who is not your regular provider.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I start a video visit?
To start a video visit, log in to Acme Online, select your provider, and click 'Start Video Visit.' Make sure you have a smartphone, tablet, or computer with a camera and microphone.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Do I need a referral to see a specialist under the Gold plan?
No, under the Gold and Platinum plans, you can access specialists directly without needing a referral.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I access the Acme Online portal?
You can access the Acme Online portal by visiting our website and clicking on the portal link.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What should I do if I need my medication today but it's after 2 PM?
If you submit your refill request after 2:00 PM Pacific, it will be filled the next business day. If you need it sooner, you might want to visit an Acme pharmacy in person.

You are the Acme Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Acme Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Are my conversations with you kept private?
Yes, all conversations are protected under HIPAA, and the audio is retained for 90 days for quality and training purposes before being permanently deleted.
